item.title: Apple Announces ‘Special’ Launch Event: Here’s What to Expect
item.description: A “special Apple experience” showcasing new products and updates is slated for March 4 in New York, London and Singapore

item.title: How This AI-Powered Machine Turns Photos Into Smells
item.description: The Anemoia Device uses generative models to bring memories to life.

item.title: Why AI Keeps Failing Inside Companies—and the Simple Playbook That Actually Works
item.description: Here are four practical and proven approaches to getting through implementation blocks.

item.title: 23 Ways Executives Are Using AI
item.description: From taking a seat at the table to eliminating busywork, founders are integrating artificial intelligence into all parts of their operations.

item.title: Scientists Identified a Hidden Cause of Workplace Burnout—And Most Employees Do It Daily
item.description: Sometimes following the unwritten rules and expectations of the office is the least helpful thing to do.
